HTML template for displaying a value and an injected value using Flask's template syntax.

# Purpose
The template code snippet uses a placeholder syntax to dynamically insert values into an HTML paragraph element. The `{{ value }}` and `{{ injected_value }}` are placeholders that will be replaced with actual data at runtime, allowing for dynamic content rendering within the paragraph.
